Item: WL Toys K989 1:28 Scale Rally Car (RTR)
Description: Contains aluminum 1:28 sclae RC car chassis. Wheels attached.

Item: 8MP Camera for Raspberry Pi 5 IMX219 130° FOV CSI Interface with 15 cm FFC for RPI 5 Zero/ZeroW/2W
Description: 130 Degree wide camera with 8MP/4K resolution. Captures visual information so the Raspberry Pi 5 can send appropriate commands to the Arduino module.

Item: Yahboom Power supply Expansion Board for Raspberry Pi 5 (5V/5A, ideally USB PD power supply)
Description: Provides a regulated 5.0V source of power to the Raspberry Pi 5.
Rechargeable Gens Ace 2 cell 1300mAh 7.4v battery with a female dean connector. Serves as the main power source.
Button to power the RC Car on and off.
Arduino Nano module with an on board IMU. Requires 3.3v power supply. Will control the peripheries which move the RC Car
11.9g metal gear digital microservo. Steers the car and controlled by the Arduino module through the Lizard Pro Esc.

Item: Furitek Lizard Pro 30A/50A Brushed/Brushless Esc For Axial SCX24 With FOC Technology
Description: Esc with controls for BLDC motor and servo. Can recieve and redistribute power.
17.5g BLDC micro motor with an rpm of 3450/KV. Will provide speed for the motor and controlled through the Esc.
3DP platform with holes for the Arduino, Raspberry Pi, and other 3DP components.
3DP Platform to maintain the LiPo battery in a central area.
3DP frame structure with holes drilled at the top to screw on the 8MP Camera. Attaches to the Raspberry Pi 5 with pegs.
3DP gerabox that keeps the BLDC motor stable and in place.
3DP piece that keeps suspensions springs and bottom of wheels from going above the chassis.
3DP steering rod attached to the wheels and servo.
